# Implementation Plan: SpecForge CLI Init & Scaffold

**Branch**: `002-cli-init-scaffold` | **Date**: 2026-03-14 | **Spec**: `specs/002-cli-init-scaffold/spec.md`
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/002-cli-init-scaffold/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by `/speckit.plan`. Research artifacts are in `research.md`. Tasks are in `tasks.md` (generated separately by `/speckit.tasks`).

---

## Summary

Build the core CLI entry point for SpecForge: a Python 3.11+ Click-based tool that scaffolds a `.specforge/` project directory tree via Jinja2-rendered Markdown templates, auto-detects installed AI agents from PATH, initializes a git repository with an initial commit, and exposes `init`, `check`, and `decompose` commands. Packaged with `pyproject.toml` + `uv` and installable via `uv tool install specforge`.

---

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: Python 3.11+
**Primary Dependencies**: Click 8.x (CLI), Jinja2 3.x (template rendering), Rich 13.x (terminal output), GitPython 3.x (git ops), pathlib (stdlib, all path operations)
**Storage**: Local filesystem only вЂ” pathlib for all I/O; no database
**Testing**: pytest + pytest-cov (coverage), ruff (linting), Click CliRunner (command integration), syrupy (snapshot tests for template rendering)
**Target Platform**: Cross-platform CLI вЂ” Windows, macOS, Linux (Python 3.11+ required)
**Project Type**: CLI tool
**Performance Goals**: Full scaffold completes in <30 seconds (SC-001); agent PATH detection completes in <1 second
**Constraints**: PATH-only agent detection (no registry/config scanning); `uv tool install` as primary distribution; no global state; all output files via Jinja2 only
**Scale/Scope**: Single-user CLI tool; no concurrency requirements

---

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

| Gate | Principle | Status |
|------|-----------|--------|
| `spec.md`, `plan.md`, `tasks.md` exist before any code is written | I. Spec-First | вњ… spec.md вњ“, plan.md вњ“ (this file), tasks.md created by `/speckit.tasks` before implementation |
| Edge cases documented in spec.md before implementation | I. Spec-First | вњ… 6 edge cases documented in spec.md В§Edge Cases |
| Core domain logic has zero external dependencies | II. Architecture | вњ… `core/` modules (project.py, agent_detector.py, result.py, config.py) have no external imports вЂ” only stdlib |
| All file generation uses Jinja2 templates (no string concat) | II. Architecture | вњ… All `.specforge/` file output routed through `templates/*.md.j2` via Jinja2 Environment |
| All functions have strict type hints; functions в‰¤30 lines, classes в‰¤200 lines | III. Code Quality | вњ… Enforced by ruff rules + code review gate in tasks.md |
| No magic strings вЂ” constants/paths in `config.py` or enums | III. Code Quality | вњ… `core/config.py` owns all constants: agent names, stack names, directory structure, default paths |
| Recoverable errors use `Result[T]`; no raised exceptions for control flow | III. Code Quality | вњ… `core/result.py` defines `Result[T]`; CLI layer translates to exit codes |
| Test files written and confirmed failing before implementation begins | IV. Testing | вњ… TDD enforced вЂ” tasks.md orders test files before their implementation counterparts |
| New modules placed in correct layer (`cli/`, `core/`, `plugins/`, `templates/`) | VI. File Structure | вњ… All new modules follow the layer map defined in constitution В§File Structure Convention |
| No cross-layer imports (e.g., `core` must not import from `cli`) | VI. File Structure | вњ… Dependency flow: `cli` в†’ `core` в†’ stdlib only; `plugins` в†’ `core`; no reverse imports |

**Gate result**: вњ… All gates pass вЂ” proceed to Phase 0 research.

```text
src/specforge/

в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cli/

в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ agent_detector.py          # PATH scanning: detect first agent in priority order
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ templates/

в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app-analyzer.md.j2
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ feature-specifier.md.j2
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ implementation-planner.md.j2
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ task-decomposer.md.j2
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ code-reviewer.md.j2
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-writer.md.j2
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ debugger.md.j2
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ features/

в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tasks-template.md.j2
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ research-template.md.j2
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data-model-template.md.j2
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ quickstart-template.md.j2

в””в”Ђв”Ђ plugins/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ agents/
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ base.py                # AgentPlugin ABC
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ claude.py              # Claude-specific config generator
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ copilot.py
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gemini.py
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cursor.py

        в””в”Ђв”Ђ codex.py

tests/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ unit/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test_result.py             # Result[T] Ok/Err/map/bind
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test_config.py             # Constants presence & types
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test_agent_detector.py     # PATH scanning with monkeypatched shutil.which
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ test_project.py            # Scaffold plan generation (no filesystem)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ integration/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test_init_cmd.py           # CliRunner + tmp_path: full init scenarios
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test_check_cmd.py          # CliRunner: pass/fail prerequisite checks
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ test_decompose_cmd.py      # CliRunner: argument validation
в””в”Ђв”Ђ snapshots/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ test_template_rendering/   # syrupy snapshots for all .md.j2 outputs
```

**Structure Decision**: Single-project layout. `src/` layout (PEP 517 compliant) with layer separation enforced by constitution. `tests/` mirrors `src/` concern boundaries: unit for core logic (no I/O), integration for CLI commands (tmp filesystem), snapshots for template outputs.

## Phase 0: Research

> See `research.md` for full findings. Key decisions summarized below.

### Resolved Decisions

| # | Question | Decision | Source |
|---|----------|----------|--------|
| R-01 | `Result[T]` implementation | Custom generic dataclass вЂ” `Ok[T]` / `Err[E]` вЂ” no third-party lib | research.md В§Result[T] |
| R-02 | Click command group structure | Subcommand modules register via `cli_group.add_command()` in `main.py`; shared state via `@click.pass_context` with a `CliContext` dataclass | research.md В§Click |
| R-03 | Jinja2 template loading | `importlib.resources.files("specforge.templates")` вЂ” Python 3.11+ native; templates declared in `[tool.setuptools.package-data]` | research.md В§Jinja2 |
| R-04 | GitPython init + commit | `Repo.init(path)` в†’ `repo.index.add(["."]) ` в†’ `repo.index.commit("chore: init specforge scaffold")` | research.md В§GitPython |
| R-05 | Agent detection | `shutil.which(name)` iterated over `AGENT_PRIORITY` list; returns first non-None | research.md В§AgentDetection |
| R-06 | Snapshot testing | syrupy вЂ” best maintenance story; `--snapshot-update` flag for intentional changes | research.md В§Snapshots |
| R-07 | pyproject.toml entry point | `[project.scripts] specforge = "specforge.cli.main:cli"` | research.md В§Packaging |
| R-08 | `--dry-run` tree preview | Collect `ScaffoldPlan` (list of `(Path, str)` tuples) first; print via `rich.tree.Tree`; skip writes if `dry_run=True` | research.md В§DryRun |

---

## Phase 1: Design

### Data Model

> See `data-model.md` for field-level detail.

**Core domain types** (all in `core/`):

```
AgentName       = Literal["claude","copilot","gemini","cursor","windsurf","codex","agnostic"]
StackName       = Literal["dotnet","nodejs","python","go","java","agnostic"]

ProjectConfig   - name: str, target_dir: Path, agent: AgentName, stack: StackName,
                  no_git: bool, force: bool, dry_run: bool, here: bool

ScaffoldPlan    - project_config: ProjectConfig,
                  files: list[ScaffoldFile]          # ordered list вЂ” deterministic

ScaffoldFile    - relative_path: Path, template_name: str, context: dict[str, Any]

ScaffoldResult  - plan: ScaffoldPlan, written: list[Path], skipped: list[Path]

DetectionResult - agent: AgentName, source: Literal["explicit","auto-detected","agnostic"]

CheckResult     - tool: str, found: bool, version: str | None, install_hint: str
```

**Result wrapper** (in `core/result.py`):
```
Result[T, E]    - Ok(value: T) | Err(error: E)
                  .map(fn) / .bind(fn) / .unwrap_or(default)
```

### Interface Contracts

> See `contracts/cli-commands.md` for full contract.

**`specforge init [NAME] [OPTIONS]`**
- `NAME` вЂ” optional positional (required unless `--here`); validated: `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+`
- `--here` вЂ” scaffold into CWD; mutually exclusive with positional NAME
- `--agent [claude|copilot|gemini|cursor|windsurf|codex]`
- `--stack [dotnet|nodejs|python|go|java]`
- `--force` вЂ” allow existing directory / `.specforge/`
- `--no-git` вЂ” skip git init + commit
- `--dry-run` вЂ” print file tree, no writes
- Exit 0: success; Exit 1: validation/IO error; Exit 2: Click usage error

**`specforge check [OPTIONS]`**
- `--agent [claude|copilot|gemini|cursor|windsurf|codex]` вЂ” check specific agent CLI
- Exit 0: all prerequisites met; Exit 1: one or more missing

**`specforge decompose DESCRIPTION`**
- `DESCRIPTION` вЂ” required positional string
- Exit 0: App Analyzer invoked; Exit 1: empty description; Exit 2: usage error

### Key Algorithmic Flows

**`specforge init` вЂ” happy path**:
```
1. Validate NAME / --here (Click)
2. Resolve target_dir (CWD/NAME or CWD)
3. Check existence в†’ abort if exists and not --force
4. Detect agent (--agent explicit OR AgentDetector.detect())
5. Build ScaffoldPlan (ProjectConfig в†’ list[ScaffoldFile])
6. If --dry-run: render Rich tree в†’ exit 0
7. Create directories (pathlib.mkdir parents=True)
8. For each ScaffoldFile: render Jinja2 в†’ write if missing OR force
9. If not --no-git: GitPython init + stage all + commit
10. Render Rich summary table (files created, agent, next steps)
```

**`specforge init` вЂ” `--here --force` (existing .specforge)**:
```
Step 8 rule: write only if destination path does not exist
(SC-006: 0 unintended overwrites of existing files)
```

**Agent detection**:
```
for name in AGENT_PRIORITY:           # ["claude","copilot","gemini","cursor","windsurf","codex"]
    if shutil.which(name) is not None:
        return DetectionResult(agent=name, source="auto-detected")
return DetectionResult(agent="agnostic", source="agnostic")
```

---

## Post-Design Constitution Re-check

| Gate | Status |
|------|--------|
| Core domain logic has zero external dependencies | вњ… `core/` types use only stdlib (`dataclasses`, `pathlib`, `typing`, `shutil`) |
| All file generation uses Jinja2 templates | вњ… `ScaffoldFile.template_name` always resolves through `Jinja2 Environment`; no f-string file writes |
| No magic strings | вњ… `AgentName` / `StackName` Literals + `AGENT_PRIORITY` list live in `config.py` |
| Recoverable errors use `Result[T]` | вњ… `project.py` and `agent_detector.py` return `Result`; `cli/` layer unwraps and calls `sys.exit` |
| No cross-layer imports | вњ… `cli` в†’ `core` вњ“; `plugins` в†’ `core` вњ“; `core` в†’ stdlib only вњ“ |

**Post-design gate result**: вњ… All gates pass.
